error_signature: user object not set correctly after auth
title: User object not set after Supabase authentication
symptom: After setting the auth token, the user object remains null, and isAuthenticated shows false despite successful token validation.
applies_when: Setting auth token via API call
not_this_if: User object is correctly set in the Supabase session
root_cause: The Supabase V1 SDK does not automatically set the user object after authentication, leading to a situation where the user is not recognized even though the token is valid.
fix_steps: Manually save the session using supabase.auth._saveSession with the result from the previous step.
Notify subscribers of the sign-in event using supabase.auth._notifyAllSubscribers('SIGNED_IN').
Optionally, call supabase.auth.update({}) to refresh the user data.
agent_instruction: Manually save the session and notify subscribers to update the user object in Supabase.
safety_notes: Using internal Supabase functions may lead to unexpected behavior in future updates.
